## Description
Briefly describe the changes introduced by this PR. Include motivation and context.

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue) / Related to # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring / Code quality
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🌐 Translation (i18n)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have followed the existing code style.
- [ ] I have tested my changes in **Google Chrome** (build/chrome).
- [ ] I have tested my changes in **Mozilla Firefox** (build/firefox).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README if necessary.
- [ ] My changes generate no new linting warnings or errors.
